name: readme-forge
description: Auto-generates production-quality README files for Claude Code. Stack-aware, 6 project types, 3 output styles, zero placeholder text.

plugins.name: readme-forge
plugins.description: Production-quality README generator. Reads your project, detects type and stack, writes docs that look handcrafted — not templated. 6 project types, 3 styles (rich/minimal/dark), verified badges, SEO-optimized output.
